title: Human recruiter reads and fixes resume bullets with visible score rubric | Resume Teardown with
caption: Human recruiter reads and fixes resume bullets with visible score rubric | Resume Teardown. Paste the job description and check your free Signal score before you apply. #jobsearch #resumehelp #careeradvice #resumetips
youtubeTitle: Human recruiter reads and fixes resume bullets with visible score rubric | Resume Teardown with
youtubeDescription: A funny recruiter-style teardown of why a qualified resume can be hard to find, how to translate a job description into resume proof, and where Signal fits without fake claims.

checks: 16:9 layout is readable on desktop and mobile YouTube surfaces.
Opening hook is visible in the first 5 seconds.
Signal mascot or brand mark is visible.
No old human presenter appears unless explicitly approved.
Audio is present, balanced, and not dominated by music or effects.
Claims avoid ATS auto-reject myths, guarantees, fake outcomes, and unsourced competitor rankings.
Thumbnail exists or is intentionally deferred.
Human reviewer approved exact file, title, description, thumbnail, and platform target.

reviewChecklist: exact YouTube title and description reviewed

title: I would circle this line first
caption: I would circle this line first. Why it starts low: SQL, Tableau, cohort analysis. Rewrite adds the missing tool, metric, and outcome: 32->89. Run the free Signal score before you apply. #jobsearch #resumehelp #careertok #resumetips #airesume

delivery: Sounds like a recruiter reading the resume live.
Short pause after the weak bullet and before the score reason.
No corporate polish, no trailer voice, no product-demo cadence.

humanReadBeats.text: Read the exact resume line: Created reports for business teams and leadership.
I believe the work happened; I just cannot see the proof yet.
Compare it to the job requirement: SQL, Tableau, cohort analysis.
Explain the visible rubric before the score: 32/100.
Rewrite only the same experience: built a SQL churn dashboard that saved six hours a week and flagged 18 at-risk accounts.

title: I searched the resume. Bad news.
caption: I searched the resume. Bad news. Search miss: Salesforce, pipeline generation, quota attainment. Rewrite adds visible proof, so the score can move: 37->88. Run the free Signal score before you apply. #jobsearch #resumehelp #careertok #resumetips #airesume

delivery: Sounds like a recruiter reading the resume live.

Rewrite only the same experience: generated 1.8 million in qualified Salesforce pipeline.

title: The job post gave the answer key
